detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GRENINJA._transfer(address,address,uint256) (GRENINJA.sol#439-501):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (GRENINJA.sol#483)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (GRENINJA.sol#515-527)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (GRENINJA.sol#489)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (GRENINJA.sol#565)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (GRENINJA.sol#499)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (GRENINJA.sol#653)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (GRENINJA.sol#633)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (GRENINJA.sol#635)
	GRENINJA._rOwned (GRENINJA.sol#241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GRENINJA._takeTeam(uint256) (GRENINJA.sol#647-655)
	- GRENINJA._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (GRENINJA.sol#629-643)
	- GRENINJA.balanceOf(address) (GRENINJA.sol#357-361)
	- GRENINJA.constructor() (GRENINJA.sol#307-321)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (GRENINJA.sol#499)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (GRENINJA.sol#661)
	GRENINJA._rTotal (GRENINJA.sol#257) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GRENINJA._getCurrentSupply() (GRENINJA.sol#753-763)
	- GRENINJA._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (GRENINJA.sol#659-665)
	- GRENINJA.constructor() (GRENINJA.sol#307-321)
	- GRENINJA.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (GRENINJA.sol#413-421)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GRENINJA.openTrading() (GRENINJA.sol#571-597):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (GRENINJA.sol#581)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GRENINJA.sol#583)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GRENINJA.sol#583)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (GRENINJA.sol#593)
	GRENINJA.tradingOpen (GRENINJA.sol#281) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GRENINJA.openTrading() (GRENINJA.sol#571-597)
